_meta.title: Per-variant Greg DG native-hook policy (DGDRIVER)
_meta.description: Source of truth mapping each FVS-modern variant to whether the Greg diameter-growth (DG) hook is enabled. Decided from an in-engine per-variant native-bias screen: enable the Greg DG hook with the REFIT coefficient set only where native FVS DG under-predicts; keep native FVS DG elsewhere. The hook is activated at runtime by emitting the DGDRIVER keyword. DGDRIVER 2 selects the refit coefficient file (config/greg_dg_coefficients_refit.csv). No DGDRIVER keyword means native FVS DG is used.

dgdriver_codes.2: refit Greg DG coefficients on our FIA data (config/greg_dg_coefficients_refit.csv)

_meta.native_bias_note: native_bias is the direction/magnitude of native FVS DG bias from the screen. Where the screen recorded a signed under-prediction that drove a HOOK decision it is summarized qualitatively as 'under-predicts'; a specific reconciled numeric value was not preserved in a single committed table, so the numeric field is left null and the qualitative basis is authoritative.
_meta.backward_compatible: Emitting these keywords is opt-in. generate_keywords(apply_dg_hook_policy=True) or dgdriver_keyword() must be called explicitly; default generate_keywords() behavior and the v2026.07-calibrated tag are unaffected.
_meta.bakuzis_caveat: Bakuzis realism gate FLAG (2026-07-04): the DG hook runs away in DBH over long-term projection (QMD 1.6-2.4x native at 200yr, 28-50 in) because the annual increment lacks a max-size/age asymptote; native DG carries the COR calibration that plateaus. VALIDATED for short remeasurement-interval prediction ONLY. Add a DG size/age deceleration (or cumulative DG cap) before enabling the hook for long-term/multi-century projection.
